untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of head-and-shoulders bottom pattern formation and identification of specific pattern components (left shoulder, head, right shoulder as dragonfly doji). Pattern recognition of this complexity is not expressible using only the allowed atomic indicators and operators. The dragonfly doji approximation (lower_wick > body) and close > high are proxies, but the head-and-shoulders bottom pattern structure, shoulder identification, and relative price levels cannot be accurately translated without pattern-specific indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation: (1) lower_wick > body approximates dragonfly doji shape, (2) close > high approximates breakout above doji top, (3) uptrend context via SMA crossover. However, this does not capture the full head-and-shoulders bottom pattern logic required by the signal. Exit condition uses MA crossover as a reversal signal due to AUTHOR_SILENT guidance.
